title: Define the v1 milestone scope
description: With the team, review the current feature set and agree on what constitutes 'v1 done'. Update plan.md M3–M5 scope to reflect real product goals rather than the generic defaults.

acceptance_criteria.text: plan.md milestones M3–M5 contain product-specific goals
prd.md feature set reflects agreed v1 scope
At least one epic exists per major feature area
